PMU_DN_RXSNP_STARV_MAXCNT_HIT.title: RXSNP stall starvation threshold hit
PMU_DN_RXSNP_STARV_MAXCNT_HIT.description: Counts the number of times the RXSNP channel becomes starved to the RXREQ channel when allocating incoming requests into the appropriate Request Tracker. Requests from PeerDNs land in the DN Snoop Link Layer buffers via 2-Part Snoops on the RXSNP channel before allocating into the Peer-Local and Peer-Remote Request Trackers. Ready DVM Requests in the SLL buffers compete against requests arriving on the RXREQ channel. REQ channel requests are given priority over SNP requests. When requests in the SLL become starved due to REQ channel requests, the Credit Stealing mechanism allows requests in the SLL to allocate into the request tracker before returning link credits for the REQ channel

cmn_rnf_txreq_withdata_rate.title: RNF Egress request rate for CHI request opcodes which cause read or write data movement.
cmn_rnf_txreq_withdata_rate.formula: (CMN_RNF_WP_TXREQ_READNOTSHAREDDIRTY_COUNT + CMN_RNF_WP_TXREQ_MAKEREADUNIQUE_COUNT + CMN_RNF_WP_TXREQ_READUNIQUE_COUNT + CMN_RNF_WP_TXREQ_READPREFERUNIQUE_COUNT + CMN_RNF_WP_TXREQ_READONCE_COUNT + CMN_RNF_WP_TXREQ_WRITEUNIQUEFULL_COUNT + CMN_RNF_WP_TXREQ_WRITEBACKFULL_COUNT) / SYS_CMN_CYCLES * 1000
cmn_rnf_txreq_withdata_rate.description: This metric represents the rate at which RNF sends requests at the CHI interface using opcodes which are directly associated with data transfer from or to the requester

cmn_ccg_rxreq_rate.title: CCG Ingress request rate
cmn_ccg_rxreq_rate.description: This metric represents the rate at which CCG receives requests at the CHI interface

cmn_ccg_rxreq_withdata_rate.title: CCG Ingress request rate for CHI request opcodes which cause read or write data movement.
cmn_ccg_rxreq_withdata_rate.formula: (CMN_CCG_WP_RXREQ_SINGLE_COUNT - (CMN_CCG_WP_RXREQ_EVICT_COUNT + CMN_CCG_WP_RXREQ_MAKEUNIQUE_COUNT + CMN_CCG_WP_RXREQ_CLEANUNIQUE_COUNT + CMN_CCG_WP_RXREQ_STASHONCEUNIQUE_COUNT + CMN_CCG_WP_RXREQ_STASHONCESEPUNIQUE_COUNT + CMN_CCG_WP_RXREQ_STASHONCESHARED_COUNT + CMN_CCG_WP_RXREQ_STASHONCESEPSHARED_COUNT + CMN_CCG_WP_RXREQ_CLEANSHARED_COUNT + CMN_CCG_WP_RXREQ_CLEANSHAREDPERSIST_COUNT + CMN_CCG_WP_RXREQ_CLEANSHAREDPERSISTSEP_COUNT + CMN_CCG_WP_RXREQ_CLEANINVALID_COUNT + CMN_CCG_WP_RXREQ_CLEANINVALIDPOPA_COUNT + CMN_CCG_WP_RXREQ_MAKEINVALID_COUNT)) / SYS_CMN_CYCLES * 1000
cmn_ccg_rxreq_withdata_rate.description: This metric represents the rate at which CCG receives requests at the CHI interface using opcodes which are directly associated with data transfer from or to the requester

cmn_ccg_rxrsp_retry_rate.title: CCG Ingress Retry response rate
cmn_ccg_rxrsp_retry_rate.description: This metric represents the rate at which CCG receives retry response at the CHI interface

cmn_ccg_txreq_rate.title: CCG Egress request rate
cmn_ccg_txreq_rate.description: This metric represents the rate at which CCG transmits requests at the CHI interface

cmn_ccg_txreq_withdata_rate.title: CCG Egress request rate for CHI request opcodes which cause read or write data movement.
cmn_ccg_txreq_withdata_rate.formula: (CMN_CCG_WP_TXREQ_SINGLE_COUNT - (CMN_CCG_WP_TXREQ_EVICT_COUNT + CMN_CCG_WP_TXREQ_MAKEUNIQUE_COUNT + CMN_CCG_WP_TXREQ_CLEANUNIQUE_COUNT + CMN_CCG_WP_TXREQ_STASHONCEUNIQUE_COUNT + CMN_CCG_WP_TXREQ_STASHONCESEPUNIQUE_COUNT + CMN_CCG_WP_TXREQ_STASHONCESHARED_COUNT + CMN_CCG_WP_TXREQ_STASHONCESEPSHARED_COUNT + CMN_CCG_WP_TXREQ_CLEANSHARED_COUNT + CMN_CCG_WP_TXREQ_CLEANSHAREDPERSIST_COUNT + CMN_CCG_WP_TXREQ_CLEANSHAREDPERSISTSEP_COUNT + CMN_CCG_WP_TXREQ_CLEANINVALID_COUNT + CMN_CCG_WP_TXREQ_CLEANINVALIDPOPA_COUNT + CMN_CCG_WP_TXREQ_MAKEINVALID_COUNT)) / SYS_CMN_CYCLES * 1000
cmn_ccg_txreq_withdata_rate.description: This metric represents the rate at which CCG sends requests at the CHI interface using opcodes which are directly associated with data transfer from or to the requester

cmn_ccg_txrsp_retry_rate.title: CCG Egress Retry response rate
cmn_ccg_txrsp_retry_rate.description: This metric represents the rate at which CCG transmits retry response at the CHI interface
